name: Elecmon (Violet)

signature_move.name: Jamming Thunder
signature_move.description: Shoots electricity generated from the static of rubbing its tails together, interfering with communications in the process.

description: An Elecmon that evolved into a Virus-type. It has an unpleasant personality that bullies indiscriminately, and dextrously uses its tails to strike the enemy. Its Signature Move is unleashing a nine-hit combo with its nine tails ( Tail Dusk ). Its Special Move is generating electricity with the static produced by rubbing its tails together, causing interference through jamming waves ( Jamming Thunder ).
